series_metadata.series_description: This series includes the Exam Booklet Basic Training, Exam Booklet In-Service Training, Scantron Alcohol Breath Testing Application/Examination, training certification and training evaluation form. These forms verify the training and test results of alcohol/drug testing applicants.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: These records to be maintained by the Bureau of Alcohol and Drug Testing for three years following decertification of applicant., Paper: Shred
